listing.name: Exportefy (CSV, Excel, PDF, Word Export)
listing.description:
### Export Trello Boards in Multiple Formats (Excel, PDF, XML, JSON, Word, CSV, and more)!

Stop Wasting Time Copying and Pasting! [Exportefy](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/power-ups/exportefy "‌") empowers you to effortlessly analyze and share your Trello data. Generate in-depth reports with Excel exports, create clear overviews with PDFs, or tailor Word documents for specific needs.

With [**Exportefy**](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/power-ups/exportefy "‌"), you can ensure that your Trello data is always accessible and shareable in the most convenient format for your workflow.

---

### [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyVsgGVPbyE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyVsgGVPbyE "smartCard-inline")

---

### Export to Excel or CSV:

**Export Excel Sheet**: Convert your Trello data into Excel or CSV formats with ease, making it simple to analyze, share, and organize your project details.

![intro.gif](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/exportefy/intro.gif)

---

### Export to Word Document:

**Create Customized Documents**: Generate Word document with all the cards, perfect for generating reports or sharing specific information.

![export-word.gif](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/exportefy/export-word.gif)

---

### Export to PDF:

**Share Clear and Detailed Overviews**: Export all card information, including titles, descriptions, labels, and attachments, in a clean and sharable PDF format.

![export-pdf.gif](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/exportefy/export-pdf.gif)

---

### Effortless Data Export Across Multiple Formats:

- **Excel Precision**: Analyze your data with powerful calculations and visualizations.
- **CSV Versatility**: Integrate your data into various applications and platforms.
- **PDF Clarity**: Share clear and detailed overviews with ease.
- **Word Customization**: Create tailored documents for specific purposes.
- **JSON, XML & More**: Access your data in various developer-friendly formats.

---

### Export by List

Easily export your Trello cards based on specific lists. Choose the desired list(s) from your Trello board that you want to include in your export.

![select-list.png](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/exportefy/select-list.png)

---

### Supported Fields:

Exportefy supports a wide range of Trello card fields, including:

- List Name
- Name
- Members
- Labels
- Checklists
- Attachments
- Comments and more
- **Custom Fields**
- [Easy Fields](https://trello.com/power-ups/664a47ac4346bf4424851478 "‌") (Fields created using Easy Fields Power-up)

![select-fields.png](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/exportefy/select-fields.png)

**Missing Fields? Tell Us!** We're always looking for ways to improve. If you need a field Exportefy doesn't currently support, [let us know](mailto:smallpowerup@gmail.com "‌")!.

---

### Enhanced Functionality with [Excelefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/657747ad4e8996a85c1630f2 "‌") and [Easy Fields](https://trello.com/power-ups/664a47ac4346bf4424851478 "‌")!

**Seamless Card Import with Excelefy**: With [Excelefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/657747ad4e8996a85c1630f2 "‌"), you can effortlessly bring your data back into Trello. Import cards directly from Excel or CSV files to create new boards or update existing ones. This feature simplifies your project setup, allowing you to quickly start working with fully populated Trello boards.

**Custom Fields with Easy Fields**: Whether you’re managing tasks, tracking budgets, or organizing contacts, the [Easy Fields](https://trello.com/power-ups/664a47ac4346bf4424851478 "‌") Power-up lets you create custom fields that meet your project’s unique needs. Export all these fields in one seamless action with Exportefy, ensuring you have all the information you need at your fingertips.

**All-in-One Subscription**: Experience the full potential of Trello with a single subscription. Exportefy not only provides comprehensive export capabilities but also offers seamless card imports with Excelefy and advanced customization with Easy Fields, all under one plan. Maximize efficiency and control over your data without the need for multiple tools.

---

### Features

- **Wide Range of Formats**: Export your data to Excel, PDF, Word, CSV, JSON, XML, and more!
- **Effortless Exporting**: With just a few clicks, your Trello data is converted and ready for use in your preferred format, making the process quick and hassle-free.
- **Unlimited Exports**: Export as much data as you need, whenever you need it.
- **Flexible Export Options**: Choose to export entire boards, specific lists, or individual cards to suit your needs.
- **Easy Fields Export**: Export all the fields created by [Easy Fields](https://trello.com/power-ups/664a47ac4346bf4424851478 "‌") (Generate custom fields on cards) power-up.
- **User-Friendly Interface**: Designed with ease of use in mind, Exportefy’s intuitive interface allows you to export your data in just a few steps, without any technical expertise required.
- **Advanced Customization**: Tailor your exports to fit your specific needs by selecting only the data you want to include, and choosing the format that best suits your purpose.
- **Secure and Reliable**: Your data’s security is our top priority. Exportefy ensures that all exports are conducted securely, keeping your information safe at all times.
- **24/7 Support**: Our dedicated team is always here to help you get the most out of Exportefy.

**Don’t let data management slow you down. Try Exportefy today and take control**

---

### Pricing Options

**Every plan begins with a 7-day free trial!** Experience full access with the freedom to cancel anytime at no cost. For more details, check out our [pricing page](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/pricing "‌").

**Note:** Each plan is available under the Individual Membership Subscription.

---

**Single Power-Up Pricing:**

Unlock **Full Access to Single Power-Up**.

- **$2.99/month**
- **$29.99/year** (Best value for annual access!)

---

**All Power-Ups Pricing:**

Unlock **Full Access to All Power-Ups** with a single subscription.

- **$7.99/month**
- **$79.99/year** (Great value for long-term access!).

With the All Power-Ups subscription, you gain access to every tool available across your Trello boards, including:

- [Excelefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/657747ad4e8996a85c1630f2 "‌"): Export and Import cards to Excel
- [Exportefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/660acb2d30346a892c44b4ae "‌"): Export board to Excel, CSV, Word, PDF and more
- [Expensefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/65350632b8805ead7ce68a27 "‌"): Manage expenses directly on your Trello cards.
- [Invoicefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/65898d97efdb94fc69551ef5 "‌"): Track and manage invoices with ease.
- [Inventoryefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/66103d3fdba97e9039f0c721 "‌"): Keep your inventory in check right on your Trello boards.
- [Wordefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/6581c70b87b87e0084fef959 "‌"): Convert Trello cards into Word documents instantly.
- [Notefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/65ff3341d29d309b5d4cc8b1 "‌"): Create private notes within your Trello cards.
- [Tablefy](https://trello.com/power-ups/661940264ed8568e464060d1 "‌"): Add powerful tables to your Trello cards.
- [Easy Fields](https://trello.com/power-ups/664a47ac4346bf4424851478 "‌"): Customize your cards with user-defined fields.
- [Card Progress](https://trello.com/power-ups/67155970753de9d084c798b2 "‌"): Easily track and visualize the progress of your cards.

---

### Subscription Management

Please note that the subscription for this Power-Up is **independent of Trello’s billing system**.
To **update, modify, or cancel your subscription**, simply use the **“Manage Subscription”** button within the Power-Up or contact our support team at [**smallpowerup@gmail.com**](mailto:smallpowerup@gmail.com "‌") for assistance.
All billing and subscription settings are managed **directly through our system**, not through Trello.

![subscription-button.png](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/exportefy/subscription-button.png)

---

### Privacy & Security

Your board data is safe with us. We never even see it. View our [privacy policy](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com/privacy "‌") here.

---

### Feedback & Support

We value your feedback and are dedicated to continuous improvement!

**Report Bugs**: Encountered an issue while using Power-up? We want to fix it for you!
**Share Suggestions**: Have an idea to make Power-up even better? We're all ears!

[Contact Us](mailto:smallpowerup@gmail.com "‌") or visit us on our [website](https://smallpowerups.d1hgvjm9dk1ut.amplifyapp.com "‌") for more information.

---
listing.overview: Export Trello Boards and Cards, Including Custom Fields, to Excel, CSV, PDF, Word, XML, JSON, and More with Just a Few Clicks.

listing.name: AI Project Planner
listing.description:
## 🎉 Your Intelligent Trello Project Assistant! 🚀

Transform your Trello boards into dynamic, AI-powered  command centers. AI Project Planner revolutionizes your workflow by automating task lists, conducting in-depth research, and optimizing roadmap seamlessly integrated within your familiar Trello workspace!


### ✨ See AI Project Planner in Action! ✨

![Roadmap Generation Demo](https://assets.apilabz.com/apps/trello/aiPlanner/roadmap.gif)


### 🌟 Key Features That Will Transform Your Workflow:

* **⚡ Instant Project Planning:** Generate complete roadmap in a flash, complete with detailed tasks, handy checklists, and precise deadlines. Say goodbye to manual setup!
* **🧠 AI-Powered Research:** Unleash the power of AI to automatically gather critical insights and conduct competitive analysis without ever leaving Trello. Your market research just got smarter!
* **✅ Smart Task Management:** Create perfectly organized, actionable to-do lists that keep your team on track and your projects moving forward.
* **🎨 Custom Templates:** Tailor Trello cards, labels, checklists, and due dates to match your unique brand and project needs. Personalization at your fingertips!
* **🔄 Real-Time Updates:** Keep your plans perpetually current with the latest data and insights. Never work with outdated information again!
* **🔔 Quick Response & Tracking:** Effortlessly track activity and receive timely updates directly on your Trello board. Stay informed, always!



## 🚀 Dive Deeper: Card Features You'll Love!

>Automatically create visually stunning and highly relevant images for all your campaigns. Boost engagement with captivating visuals!

![AI Image Generation](https://assets.apilabz.com/apps/trello/aiPlanner/imageGeneration.gif)

>Refine titles, descriptions, and checklists with a single click. Let AI polish your content for maximum impact and clarity!

![AI Content Refinement](https://assets.apilabz.com/apps/trello/aiPlanner/refine.gif)


>Gather real-time data, invaluable insights, and comprehensive competitive analysis—all without ever having to leave Trello! Your research powerhouse is now integrated.

![AI Research](https://assets.apilabz.com/apps/trello/aiPlanner/research.gif)


>Effortlessly track project activity and receive instant updates. Keep communication flowing and your team aligned!

![Quick Response](https://assets.apilabz.com/apps/trello/aiPlanner/response.gif)

---

## 📲 Simple Setup: Get Started in Minutes!

Follow these easy steps to bring AI Project Planner to your Trello boards:

![Installation Guide](https://assets.apilabz.com/apps/trello/aiPlanner/install.gif)

1.  Navigate to your Trello board and click on "**Power-Ups**."
2.  In the search bar, type and find "**AI Project Planner by API Labz.**"
3.  Click "**Add**" to seamlessly install the Power-Up.
4.  Follow the straightforward authentication process to connect AI Project Planner.

---

## 🔒 Secure Authentication: Your Data, Your Control!

Your security is our priority. Our authentication process is designed to be quick and secure:

![Authentication Process](https://assets.apilabz.com/apps/trello/aiPlanner/auth.gif)

---

## 💰 Flexible Pricing: Smart Spending, Big Results!

Experience the power of AI Project Planner without breaking the bank:

* 🎁 Get **10 FREE credits** just for signing up! Start optimizing immediately!
* 💲 Need more? Get **100 credits for just $1** – incredible value!
* Choose our convenient **pay-as-you-go model** – only pay for what you use.
* Absolutely **NO monthly fees!** Enjoy full flexibility and control over your budget.

---

### 📞 Need a Hand? We're Here to Help!

Have questions or need support? Don't hesitate to reach out!

* 📧 Email us directly at info@apilabz.com
* 🗓️ Or, for a more personalized touch, [schedule a meeting with our team here](https://apilabz.com/resources/meeting)!

---

listing.name: Google Drive
listing.description:
El Power-Up de Google Drive para Trello te permite integrar tus archivos y carpetas de Drive en tarjetas de Trello. Busca en Google Drive desde Trello y podrás adjuntar los archivos y carpetas que consideres relevantes. Además, podrás ver vistas previas y detalles en tiempo real y volver a Google Drive con un clic.

- La búsqueda integrada de archivos te permite adjuntar carpetas y archivos de Google Drive en una tarjeta de Trello, independientemente de la versión de Trello que utilices.
- Consulta en tiempo real la información y las vistas previas de todas las carpetas y archivos adjuntos a las tarjetas.

![captura de pantalla](https://google-drive.trello.services/images/screenshots/Google_Drive_5.jpg)
listing.overview: Acceda a los archivos de Drive de un proyecto desde su tarjeta, o cree archivos de Drive y adjúntelos desde esa misma tarjeta.

checklist.name: Registro y Control de Acceso (Enfoque: Estudiante)
Registro y Control de Acceso (Enfoque: Estudiante)

old.desc:
### Registro y Control de Acceso (Enfoque: Estudiante)

#### PBI 01: Escaneo de QR desde el navegador.

`Criterio de Aceptación: El usuario puede acceder a la cámara desde cualquier dispositivo con navegador (Chrome, Safari, etc.) sin instalar apps adicionales.`

#### PBI 02: Registro automático con marca temporal.

`Criterio de Aceptación: El sistema debe registrar la hora exacta del escaneo y validar la identidad contra la base de datos de ULSA.`

#### PBI 03: Confirmación visual de éxito.

`Criterio de Aceptación: La interfaz debe mostrar un feedback inmediato y claro tras un registro exitoso.`

#### PBI 04: Visualización de historial de actividades.

`Criterio de Aceptación (Deseable): El estudiante puede consultar su propio registro de asistencias pasadas.`

card.desc: ### Gestión y Supervisión (Enfoque: Personal Institucional)

cards.desc: Como **Administrador**, quiero una base de datos centralizada para asegurar que todos los registros de acceso se almacenen correctamente
cards.name: [EP-01] Infraestructura HTTP

cards.desc: Como **Administrador**, quiero registrar usuarios autorizados para controlar el acceso al sistema.
cards.name: [EP-02] Backend y API
PBI 01: Escaneo de QR desde el navegador.

cards.desc: Como **Usuario** autorizado, quiero iniciar sesión para acceder a funcionalidades del sistema.
cards.name: [EP-03] Autenticación

cards.desc:
- Como **Supervisor**, quiero capturar imágenes desde la cámara para detectar matrículas.
- Como **Supervisor**, quiero la identificación automática de placas usando IA para automatizar reconocimiento.
- Como **Supervisor**, quiero la extracción automática del texto de la matrícula detectada.
cards.name: [EP-04] Detección IA

cards.desc:
- Como **Supervisor**, quiero visualizar el historial de accesos vehiculares.
- Como **Administrador**, quiero visualizar estadísticas del flujo vehicular.
- Como **Supervisor**, quiero visualizar los parqueos y vehículos en tiempo real en un mapa.
cards.name: [EP-05] Panel de Control

cards.desc:
- Como **Administrador**, quiero que el sistema esté disponible a través de la red local (LAN) para que el personal de supervisión pueda acceder a la plataforma desde cualquier terminal autorizada.
- Como **Administrador**, quiero monitorear el intercambio de peticiones HTTP para verificar la integridad de los datos enviados por la cámara y asegurar una respuesta oportuna del servidor
cards.name: [EP-06] Evaluación HTTP

cards.desc: Como **Administrador**, quiero contar con documentación del flujo de datos para facilitar futuras actualizaciones y soporte del sistema
cards.name: [EP-07] Documentación

Implementar JWT Authentication Y Crear middleware de autorización por roles
Crear vista de gestión de usuarios
Crear modelo HistorialAcceso y relacionar con Acceso
Crear endpoint GET /api/historial e Implementar filtros por fecha y placa
Crear modelo Alerta y enum TipoAlerta
Mostrar estado de acceso en UI
Definir sistema de colores y tipografía

checkItems.name: Acceso cámara permitido; imagen capturada; envío al backend.
Modelo identifica región de placa; bounding box retornado.
OCR extrae texto; texto guardado en BD.
Se registra fecha y hora automáticamente.
El registro se consulta mediante API.
Tabla visible; filtro por placa y fecha.
Dashboard con gráficos y conteo de accesos.
Servidor responde en puerto 80; acceso desde otro dispositivo LAN; entrega archivos y endpoints API.
Identificación de métodos GET/POST; identificación de códigos HTTP.
Tablas para usuarios, vehículos y registros.
Ejemplos de request y response; análisis headers.
Total trazabilidad del flujo de trabajo
